text:
🚪 #approvals — waiting for Andy ✅ (2026-07-01)
All items are proposals only. Nothing sent.
• Supply·Acquisition · outreach draft → Edubrain.ai (monetize free homework help)
• Supply·Acquisition · outreach draft → Mindko (revenue path, keep it free)
• Supply·Acquisition · outreach draft → aiHomeworkHelper.org (turn free answers into revenue)
• Decision · bless Edubrain / Mindko / aiHomeworkHelper as next install targets
Blocked on: sending-domain warm-up (all cold sends). Creative vein needs brand-safety review before demand match.
Still open from 6-30: drafts for HomeworkO, YouLearn, StudyX, Studyable, QwenPaw.
